fixes.replacement:
placeholders = ",".join(["%s"] * len(ids))
statement = (
    "SELECT id, rule_id, severity, created_at "
    "FROM risk_events "
    "WHERE rule_id IN (" + placeholders + ") "
    "AND created_at >= %s "
    "ORDER BY created_at DESC"
)
